notes: Case 2004-13 (Complaint of TE Wayne Zaepfel vs. Central Carolina Presbytery) appears in the GA33 (2005) SJC docket list at p. 72 but was not completed in time for the March 2005 SJC meeting. The case awaited final determination by the full SJC in October 2005 (GA34, 2006). No decision opinion text is present in the candidate pages; only the docket entry and status notation at pages 72-74 indicate the case's existence and incomplete status at GA33.
